data_description.api_key: Enter your API key provided by EPA Victoria.
data_description.aqi_source: Choose whether primary AQI sensors are sourced from PM2.5 or Overall AQI.
data_description.site_id: Select the EPA Victoria location, or leave as is to use the nearest station.

location.description:
Latitude and longitude will be used to find the nearest EPA air quality monitoring station to obtain air quality data for your location.

The default values come from your homeassistant "Home" zone (See Settings/Areas & Zones/Zones).
location.title: Set up EPA (Victoria) Air Monitoring

data.apply_to_all: Apply this API key to all instances currently using the same key
